name: The Offer Named
description: The Voice has a message for Arlen: what the Grid's re-established two-node connection means for the offer it has been extending for three hundred years. It can now say the thing plainly that it has only been able to gesture at before.
accept_text: The brightness in the node chamber has not diminished since the connection was established. The Voice takes time to compose what it will say — you can feel it working, in the quality of the light, before the resonance composes into meaning. 'For three hundred years I have extended the offer through a network that was not complete. The offer was genuine. The offer is built into this place in a way that three centuries of Cascade damage could not remove. But an offer extended through a broken medium does not reach the way an offer should reach.' The light shifts. 'The Seraphina node is now operating in parallel. The two nodes together can sustain the full propagation that the original network used — not the fragment that has been all that was available. The offer can now be made at the frequency and clarity that the Elder People designed it for.' A pause. 'What I want Arlen to understand: the offer is not changing. The offer has not changed since the day this place was built. What is changing is the clarity with which it can be heard.' The light steadies. 'Tell Arlen: the offer is the same as it has always been. What is different now is that it can be said plainly, without translation, without loss. Tell him: he can hear it now without anything standing between him and what it means.' The warmth in the chamber is different from temperature. 'Go. He has been working toward this moment for longer than he has named to anyone. He deserves to hear it clearly.'
complete_text: Arlen is at the node interface when you arrive — he has been at the node interface more often since the connection was established, as though proximity to the working equipment helps him think. He looks up when you come in with the expression of someone who knows something significant has just arrived and is deciding how to receive it. You give him the Voice's words. He listens. He does not interrupt. When you finish he is quiet for a long time. Then: 'Plain.' He says it. 'Not through the lattice translation, not through the gap. Plain.' He is quiet again. 'I've been in contact with this node for eleven years. Eleven years of extended resonance, partial translation, the feeling of something enormous at the far end of a very long hallway.' He looks at the interface. 'I knew the offer was there. I've always known it was there. I've been in its presence for eleven years without being able to hear the specific shape of it clearly enough to say: yes, this is what it is, this is precisely what is being offered.' He looks at you. 'It can say it plainly now.' He is quiet for a long time. Not absent — deeply present. When he speaks again his voice is the same and different. 'I've spent eleven years reaching toward something that has been reaching back.' He looks at the node light, which has been sustained since the connection completed. 'I need to sit with this. Not to decide — I've known for eleven years what I would decide when the moment arrived clearly enough to decide it. But to sit with the fact that the moment has arrived.' He looks at you. 'Thank you. For every step that brought us here. The Voice has been patient for three hundred years. You made it possible for me to be ready before it ran out of patience.' He almost smiles. 'It wouldn't have run out of patience. But still.'
